welcome_offer.description: Earn 125,000 bonus points after you spend $6,000 in purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select Membership for lounge access.

other_benefits.name: Sapphire Lounge Network
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase Sapphire Lounges by The Club.

other_benefits.name: Reserve Travel Designer
other_benefits.description: Personalized service valued at up to $300 per trip.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: 1 to 1 value to leading airline and hotel partners.

recurring_credits.name: Annual Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 annual credit for travel purchases (airfare, hotels, car rentals) worldwide. Automatically applied.

recurring_credits.name: Semi-Annual Dining Credit
recurring_credits.description: $150 every 6 months ($300/year) for dining at restaurants worldwide. Credit loaded to Chase Dining credit.

recurring_credits.name: Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $250 annual credit for prepaid hotel bookings made through The Edit by Chase Travel.

recurring_credits.name: Flexible Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $500 annual credit for prepaid travel via The Edit by Chase Travel (flexible, can be used for flights, hotels, etc.).

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 credit every 4 years for Global Entry or $85 for TSA PreCheck.

recurring_credits.name: Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 in statement credits for travel purchases each account anniversary year.

recurring_credits.name: The Edit Credit
recurring_credits.description: $250 credit from Jan-Jun and $250 from Jul-Dec for prepaid bookings with The Edit (2-night min).

recurring_credits.name: Dining Credit
recurring_credits.description: $150 credit from Jan-Jun and $150 from Jul-Dec for Sapphire Exclusive Tables on OpenTable.

recurring_credits.name: Apple TV/Music
recurring_credits.description: Complimentary Apple TV and Apple Music subscriptions through 6/22/2027.

recurring_credits.name: StubHub Credits
recurring_credits.description: $150 credit from Jan-Jun and $150 from Jul-Dec for StubHub/viagogo.
